start.speaker: Cael
start.text: You made it through the checkpoint. Keep your voice low, learn the routes, and do not promise what you cannot carry.

work.speaker: Cael
work.text: Start small. Search the scrap crate beside the stall, then come back before someone else writes your story for you.

fringe.speaker: Cael
fringe.text: The Fringe is where Solenne stops pretending every life fits a form.
